calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Apr-03-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:34am and concluding at 9:44am.

Plaintiff BMO Bank N.A. A National Banking Association appearing represented by Ja Vonne M. Phillips, Esq., via zoom.
Defendants 2040 Services and Tariq Ayyad not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's request for interest and it's justification for attorney fees. Court reviews declaration of counsel re: attorney fees.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff DORIS LAWSON and she confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff BMO Bank N.A. a National Banking Association, and against Defendants 2040 Services and Tariq Ayyad, as follows:

Damages: $299,009.58
Prejudgment Interest: $44,976.00
Attorney Fees: $1,740.00
Costs: $589.50

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $346,315.08

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
